enterpriseDashboard.title: Operations dashboard
enterpriseDashboard.subtitle: A real-time overview of sales, stock, purchasing, and branch health.
enterpriseDashboard.refreshSuccessMessage: The latest dashboard data is now visible.

metricDescriptions.revenue: Completed sales in the selected period
metricDescriptions.cashCollected: Paid customer payments in the period

sections.salesTrendDescription: Daily revenue and completed order movement.
sections.topProductsDescription: Best revenue contributors in the selected period.
sections.stockHealthDescription: Tracked stock posture across the selected scope.
sections.locationPerformanceDescription: Revenue, orders, and stock value by branch.
sections.recentActivityDescription: Latest sales, purchase, and stock movements.
sections.quickActionsDescription: Move from insight to the operational surface.

empty.topProducts: No product sales were found for this period.
empty.alerts: No urgent operating alerts right now.
empty.activity: No recent activity was found for this period.

cashDrawerDashboard.title: Cash drawer control
cashDrawerDashboard.subtitle: Location-scoped drawer oversight, reconciliation confidence, and cashier session history.

notifications.refreshMessage: Fetching the latest drawer and session data.
notifications.refreshedMessage: The latest cash drawer data is visible.
notifications.refreshFailedMessage: Unable to refresh the drawer dashboard.

sections.drawerHealthDescription: Open status, expected cash, counted cash, variance, and recent drawer activity.
sections.confidenceDescription: Risk signals that help admins and cashiers trust the closeout process.
sections.cashFlowDescription: Daily opening float, cash sales, cash in, cash out, and refund movement.
sections.sessionsDescription: Cashier sessions with tender totals, expected cash, closing count, and variance.
sections.journalDescription: Recent auditable cash drawer events in the selected period.
sections.actionsDescription: Move from drawer insight to the connected operating surfaces.

summary.thresholds: Variance thresholds: review at {medium}, manager attention at {high}.

alerts.staleSession: {count} open session(s) have been active for more than 12 hours.
alerts.openDrawerWithoutSession: {count} open drawer(s) are not linked to an active cashier session.
alerts.ready: No drawer risk signals were found for this period.

empty.drawers: No cash drawers were found for this scope.
empty.trend: No drawer movement was found for this period.
empty.sessions: No cashier sessions were found for this period.
empty.journal: No drawer journal events were found for this period.

financeDashboard.title: Finance command center
financeDashboard.subtitle: Payments, receivables, payables, margin, tax, cash flow, and drawer assurance in one controlled finance surface.

notifications.refreshMessage: Fetching the latest payments, balances, and cash movement.
notifications.refreshedMessage: The latest finance data is visible.
notifications.failedMessage: Unable to refresh the finance dashboard.

sections.movementDescription: Daily inflow, outflow, revenue, purchases, expenses, and net cash movement for the selected scope.
sections.assuranceDescription: Risk signals that help admins, cashiers, and finance users trust the numbers.
sections.receivablesDescription: Customer balances and open sales exposure by aging bucket.
sections.payablesDescription: Supplier balances and open purchasing exposure by aging bucket.
sections.paymentsDescription: Latest inbound and outbound payments with method, status, processor, and counterparty.
sections.methodsDescription: Tender and settlement methods for the selected period.

alerts.overdueAp: {count} payable item(s) need payment attention, totaling {amount}.
alerts.negativeMargin: The selected period is showing negative margin of {amount}.
alerts.cashGap: Net cash flow is negative by {amount}.
alerts.ready: No finance risk signals were found for this period.

empty.trend: No financial movement was found for this period.
empty.counterparties: No open balances were found for this scope.
empty.payments: No payments were found for this scope.
empty.methods: No payment methods were found for this period.

paymentReconciliationWorkbench.title: Payment reconciliation workbench
paymentReconciliationWorkbench.subtitle: Rail-level payment assurance, duplicate provider-reference alerts, and suspense-ready exception queues.

certification.title: Durable evidence kernel
certification.description: Provider events, statement lines, reconciliation runs, exception queues, and suspense requests are now read from the durable reconciliation model.
certification.closeBlocked: {count} blocker(s) must be cleared before sign-off.
certification.emptyProviderAccounts: No active provider account is configured yet.
certification.emptyRuns: No durable reconciliation runs have been created yet.

notifications.runStartedMessage: The provider account is being reconciled against durable evidence.
notifications.runCompleteMessage: The run summary, exceptions, and suspense queue have been refreshed.
notifications.signStartedMessage: Fresh-auth and maker-checker controls are being verified.
notifications.signCompleteMessage: The reconciliation certificate hash has been stored.
notifications.exportStartedMessage: The signed certificate is being watermarked and logged.
notifications.exportCompleteMessage: The signed reconciliation certificate download has started.

suspenseWorkflow.title: Suspense approval lane
suspenseWorkflow.description: Assign, propose reclassification, and approve suspense posting requests with maker-checker evidence.
suspenseWorkflow.empty: No durable suspense item is waiting for approval.

notifications.assignedMessage: The suspense item and linked exception are now assigned.
notifications.proposedMessage: The maker proposal is ready for independent approval.
notifications.approvedMessage: The approved suspense posting request was recorded.

inbox.title: Reconciliation inbox
inbox.description: Durable in-app notifications for exception ownership, SLA risk, sign-off readiness, and close blockers.
inbox.empty: No reconciliation inbox item has been delivered yet.

source.providerPersistencePending: Provider statement and signed reconciliation-run persistence is not present yet, so this view shows capture-readiness evidence from existing payments.

notifications.refreshMessage: Fetching the latest payment capture evidence.
notifications.refreshedMessage: The latest reconciliation workbench data is visible.
notifications.failedMessage: Unable to refresh the reconciliation workbench.

sections.runsDescription: Per-rail capture-readiness runs generated from existing payment evidence.
sections.assuranceDescription: Coverage and source maturity for the selected period.
sections.failureGroupsDescription: Exception clusters grouped by payment rail and failure type.
sections.duplicatesDescription: Provider references that appear on more than one captured payment.
sections.suspenseDescription: Failures classified with 47x suspense hints and evidence references.

empty.failureGroups: No reconciliation failure groups were found for this scope.
empty.duplicates: No duplicate provider references were found.
empty.suspense: No suspense-ready failures were found for this scope.

complianceCenter.title: Compliance Center
complianceCenter.subtitle: Fiscal document queues, authority-submission evidence, and adapter readiness for the current tenant.

notifications.refreshMessage: Fetching the latest fiscal document and submission queues.
notifications.refreshedMessage: The Compliance Center snapshot has been updated.
notifications.failedMessage: Unable to refresh the Compliance Center.

states.unauthenticatedDescription: Sign in with an account that can read fiscal documents before opening this dashboard.
states.deniedDescription: Your role does not include the compliance.documents.read permission for this tenant.
states.degraded: {count} compliance blocker(s) or adapter risk(s) need operator review.

sections.documentsDescription: Recent statutory envelopes with source, amount, country-pack provenance, and authority references.
sections.adaptersDescription: Country authority configuration and expert-review readiness.
sections.submissionsDescription: Pending, retry, rejection, and dead-letter work that operators must not lose in logs.

empty.documentsDescription: The selected scope has no fiscal documents in the compliance kernel yet.
empty.adaptersDescription: Configure a reviewed sandbox or manual portal adapter before production certification claims.
empty.submissionsDescription: The selected scope has no authority submission work requiring operator attention.

receiptPreview.whatsappQueuedMessage: The receipt delivery attempt was recorded.
receiptPreview.whatsappFailedMessage: Unable to send the receipt via WhatsApp.

setup.title: Register setup
setup.lockedDuringShift: Location and terminal are locked while this shift is open.

shift.title: Shift
shift.closeWizardDescription: Review tender totals, count the drawer, and confirm the final variance.
shift.varianceWarning: Drawer variance is {amount}. A manager review may be required.

catalog.detailDescription: Review sellable stock, identity, and item context without crowding the sales grid.
catalog.detailBackendNote: Supplier, movement, and price-history panels need the next product detail service slice.

customers.title: Customer
customers.description: Choose one customer for this transaction. The selected customer is locked until you change it or return to walk-in.
customers.creditWarning: Projected account balance exceeds the configured credit limit.

search.placeholder: Scan barcode or search SKU, item, or category

empty.openShiftTitle: Open a shift to start selling
empty.openShiftDescription: Select a location and terminal, declare the opening float, then the live inventory catalog will be ready for scanning.
empty.noItems: No sellable inventory items match this view.

cart.title: Cart
cart.empty: Scan or select an item to start a persisted draft sale.

tender.shortPayment: Payment is short by {amount}. Enter the full amount or use another tender.
tender.customerRequired: Select a customer before charging this sale on account.
tender.nonCashOverpay: Only cash can exceed the remaining balance because change can only be given from cash.

receipt.destinationPlaceholder: Receipt destination: email, phone, or WhatsApp number

notifications.genericError: The POS operation could not be completed. Please try again.
notifications.setupRequiredMessage: Choose a location and terminal before opening the register.
notifications.openShiftRequiredMessage: Open a cashier shift before adding items to the cart.
notifications.openShiftPendingMessage: Creating the cashier session and preparing the drawer.
notifications.openShiftSuccessMessage: {terminal} is ready with an opening float of {amount}.
notifications.closeShiftPendingMessage: Reconciling the drawer and closing the cashier session.
notifications.closeShiftSuccessMessage: Session {number} was closed with an actual drawer balance of {amount}.
notifications.addItemSuccessMessage: {item} was added to the current sale.
notifications.removeItemSuccessMessage: {item} was removed from the current sale.
notifications.saleBlockedMessage: Review the tender and customer before charging this sale.
notifications.salePendingMessage: Charging {amount} for {customer} and posting the related transactions.

featureGates.title: Backend workflow needed
featureGates.message: {feature} needs a dedicated POS service/action before it can be safely used in production.

pos.hotkeys: Ctrl/Cmd K search - F4 customer - F8 tender - Esc clear

hero.titleStart: Run stock, sales, cash, compliance, and close from
hero.description: AqStoqFlow connects POS, inventory, purchasing, finance, accounting, compliance, payroll, reconciliation, and branch controls so every operational move can carry tenant scope, permission context, source evidence, and ledger impact.

dashboard.title: Operations assurance snapshot
dashboard.nextAction: Review reconciliation suspense before period close

operations.title: One operating model, not disconnected modules.
operations.description: The platform surfaces real operational boundaries: POS sessions, inventory movement, purchasing/AP, finance, OHADA accounting, compliance evidence, payroll and presence, payment reconciliation, role controls, and branch administration.

problem.title: SMBs do not just need screens. They need provable operating truth.
problem.copy: Risky when it lives alone; reliable when the event, permission, evidence, and ledger record travel together.

workflow.title: Every module moves on the same ledger-first operating spine.
workflow.description: Scroll across the AqStoqFlow workflow: a country-pack-driven, multi-tenant OHADA SMB operating system where POS, inventory, purchasing/AP, accounting close, compliance, reconciliation, payroll/presence, offline sync, and controls all carry source evidence forward.

pos.title: POS
pos.copy: Cashier sessions, receipts, returns, drawers, fiscal handoff, and sales evidence start the operating record.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.copy: Items, counts, transfers, write-offs, locations, and valuation signals explain stock before it reaches the books.

purchasing.title: Purchasing/AP
purchasing.copy: Purchase orders, receiving, supplier invoices, matching, approvals, and payment release keep AP disciplined.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.copy: Vendor terms, item links, payable readiness, bank-change review, and payment risk stay visible.

customers.title: Customers
customers.copy: Customer history, receivables context, payments, orders, and account signals stay tied to operations.

finance.title: Finance
finance.copy: Cash drawers, payables, receivables, taxes, margins, profitability, and retail analytics converge.

accounting.title: Accounting close
accounting.copy: OHADA chart, journals, posting rules, trial balance, source links, close blockers, and close packs align.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.copy: Fiscal documents, legal evidence, country packs, authority queues, and adapter readiness stay governed.

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.copy: Provider events, statement imports, matching, suspense, sign-off, and certificates protect payment truth.

payroll.title: Payroll/presence
payroll.copy: Employees, contracts, presence, attendance, leave, payroll runs, approvals, payslips, and postings connect.

offline.title: Offline sync
offline.copy: Device identity, queued POS work, replay discipline, conflict handling, and evidence preserve branch continuity.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.copy: Branch-to-branch dispatch, receiving, variance, accountability, and source movement records remain traceable.

locations.title: Locations
locations.copy: Branches, warehouses, terminals, tax settings, units, and organization setup define operating scope.

controls.title: Controls
controls.copy: Tenant scope, RBAC, step-up, maker-checker, approvals, and audit trails prevent silent risky moves.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.copy: Dashboards, reports, accountant exports, exception queues, and data-trust indicators reflect source records.

administration.title: Administration
administration.copy: Users, invitations, roles, permissions, module gates, country settings, and setup keep the platform governed.

gallery.title: Product views built around evidence, exceptions, and close readiness.
gallery.description: The page should sell the operating discipline without becoming noisy: one product surface, then compact panels that show the signals teams actually scan.

preview.title: Product views stay close to the records they explain

inventory.title: Inventory movement ledger
inventory.copy: Stock levels, counts, transfers, write-offs, and valuation risk stay visible by location.

purchase.title: Purchasing and AP controls
purchase.copy: Purchase orders, receiving, supplier invoices, bank changes, and payments move through review.

finance.title: Close and reconciliation cockpit
finance.copy: Cash, provider evidence, suspense, journals, and close blockers converge before reporting.

inventory.title: Inventory

purchasing.title: Purchasing
purchasing.copy: Keep order, receipt, invoice, approval, and supplier-payment risk in one workflow.

finance.title: Finance
finance.copy: Connect cash drawers, payments, receivables, payables, margins, and tax visibility.

accounting.copy: Tie journals, posting rules, trial balance, source links, and close packs together.

automation.title: Automation stays controlled because every action needs evidence.

stock.when: When stock falls below policy or a count variance appears
stock.then: Queue adjustment or purchase review with source evidence

margin.when: When payment evidence does not match the ledger
margin.then: Create suspense and block close until reviewed

transfer.when: When payroll, fiscal, or supplier payment needs approval
transfer.then: Route maker-checker review before posting or release

trust.title: Trust is built from tenant scope, source evidence, and controlled posting.

permissions.title: Tenant, RBAC, and step-up controls
permissions.copy: Keep every action scoped to the right organization, branch, role, and assurance level.

audit.title: Source-linked audit trails
audit.copy: Receipts, movements, approvals, journals, and close packs preserve their supporting evidence.

branches.title: Branch and device controls
branches.copy: Model branches, warehouses, POS terminals, drawers, and offline replay without losing accountability.

finance.title: Ledger-backed financial truth
finance.copy: Cash, margins, receivables, payables, taxes, reconciliation, and close status share one record.

useCases.title: Adapt the same control spine to each OHADA SMB operating model.

retail.title: Retail chains
retail.copy: Connect branch sales, drawer sessions, stock counts, replenishment, and daily cash evidence.
retail.label: multi-branch

wholesale.title: Wholesale teams
wholesale.copy: Coordinate supplier terms, purchase orders, customer receivables, payment evidence, and margin risk.
wholesale.label: credit aware

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.copy: Track fast-moving inputs, shift accountability, cash drawers, purchasing, and stock variance.
restaurants.label: shift-ready

pharmacies.title: Pharmacies
pharmacies.copy: Control batches, expiry, transfers, restricted permissions, audit evidence, and supplier follow-up.
pharmacies.label: batch control

service.title: Service counters
service.copy: Align orders, customer balances, payments, payroll presence, and accountant-ready records.
service.label: account ledgers

pricing.title: Adopt the platform by control depth, not by slogans.

starter.name: Core operations
starter.description: For teams centralizing POS, stock, and purchasing
starter.features: Inventory, POS, customers, suppliers, purchase orders, dashboard basics

growth.name: Control layer
growth.description: For teams adding finance, roles, and branch controls
growth.features: Finance, cash drawers, RBAC, locations, analytics, approval queues

enterprise.name: Assurance layer
enterprise.description: For regulated OHADA workflows and accountant-ready operations
enterprise.features: Accounting, close assurance, compliance, reconciliation, payroll, offline sync

finalCta.title: Give daily operations the same discipline as period close.
finalCta.copy: Start with the modules your team runs today, then grow into OHADA accounting, compliance, reconciliation, payroll, and assurance without breaking the evidence trail.

footer.subtitle: OHADA SMB operations, controlled
footer.copy: A ledger-first operating layer for inventory-heavy businesses that need POS, stock, purchasing, finance, compliance, payroll, reconciliation, and branch controls to speak the same truth.
footer.copyright: AqStoqFlow. Built for disciplined OHADA operations.
